shortDescription: 6-year General Medicine (Medical Doctor) · Moscow · English & Russian tracks

policyAlert.summary: Verify current tuition, intake dates, and admission requirements on synergy.ru/ before quoting clients. Indian students: confirm NEET eligibility and NMC guidance separately.

alert.title: Foreign medical degree pathway
alert.body: Verify NMC recognition and FMGE/NExT requirements before quoting Synergy University to Indian clients.

about.label: Description
about.value: Synergy University (Synergy) offers Medical Doctor (General Medicine specialist programme). Clinical practice integrated from early years at partner clinics and hospitals in Moscow and Russia — verify current affiliations on synergy.ru.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Meet Synergy admission requirements · English proficiency where required · Indian applicants: verify NEET eligibility with current NMC rules

about.label: Accreditation highlight
about.value: State licence and accreditation of Synergy University (Russia)

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Synergy University (admissions) · Russia immigration authorities for study permit / visa

about.label: After graduation
about.value: FMGE/NExT for India · Host-country licensing exams · Verify WDOMS and NMC list status

accreditation: State licence and accreditation of Synergy University (Russia)
Medical faculty programmes listed on official university site — verify current status
Verify NMC foreign medical institutions list before Indian client enrollment
mbbs.mediumOfInstruction: Russian and English programmes — verify track with admissions
mbbs.clinicalTrainingNotes: Clinical practice integrated from early years at partner clinics and hospitals in Moscow and Russia — verify current affiliations on synergy.ru.
mbbs.campusNotes: Main medical faculty campuses in Moscow (Leningradsky Prospekt and related sites). Dormitory options for international students — confirm with admissions.

relatedPrograms.name: Medical Doctor (General Medicine)
relatedPrograms.summary: Primary programme for international medical applicants. Verify language of instruction and accreditation documents before contract.

relatedPrograms.name: Dentistry (Stomatology)
relatedPrograms.summary: Separate faculty programme — do not conflate with General Medicine counselling.

relatedPrograms.name: Pharmacy (Pharmaceutical)
relatedPrograms.summary: Pharmacy track on medical faculty — separate admission and licensing pathway.

familyOptions.spouseCanAccompany: Possible subject to Russia dependant visa rules — verify current immigration policy before client commitment.
familyOptions.spouseWorkRights: Spouse work authorization varies by Russia rules — do not promise employment without visa approval.
familyOptions.childrenCanAccompany: Case-by-case — verify dependant visa rules and schooling availability.
familyOptions.childrenNotes: Plan schooling and childcare before family relocation.
familyOptions.additionalFundsRequired: Additional living funds and health insurance for each dependant — verify with admissions.
familyOptions.visaRoute: Student visa/residence for principal applicant; dependants require separate permits per Russia rules.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse work without visa approval
Verify all family immigration with official sources
Clinical years may require separate visa strategy (if applicable)

practicePathways.summary: Graduates of Synergy University must verify licensing pathways in India (FMGE/NExT), host country, and any international targets on official sources.

india.fmgeNext: Indian citizens with foreign medical degrees must qualify FMGE (transitioning to NExT) and meet NMC requirements before registration in India.
details: Verify institution status on NMC foreign medical institutions list before enrollment.
Degree pathway: Medical Doctor (General Medicine specialist programme) — set client expectations early vs Indian 5.5-year MBBS.
Internship/clinical hours must meet NMC criteria — verify with current NMC notifications.
Never guarantee FMGE/NExT pass or India registration.

hostCountry.summary: Graduates may pursue medical licensing in Russia after completing state exams and internship requirements — verify current Federal Service for Supervision of Healthcare rules.
details: Clinical training at partner hospitals in Moscow and Russia.
Russian language proficiency may be required for clinical years on Russian-medium tracks — verify with admissions.
Migration registration required after arrival — maintain valid student residence.

usCanada.summary: Russia pathway graduates typically pursue licensing in Russia, CIS countries, or return to India via FMGE/NExT — US residency is not the default pathway.
details: Verify whether degree is listed in WDOMS and recognised in target practice countries.
Do not promise US residency without verified individual eligibility.

recognition.who: Verify World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS) listing and WFME recognition chain.
recognition.nmc: Counselors must verify current NMC eligible colleges list — status can change; check before each intake.

restrictions: Never guarantee licensure, residency match, or India registration
Verify NMC list at time of admission

documentChecklistSections.label: Admission documents
items: Official transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor's / pre-med as required)
NEET scorecard (Indian applicants — if required under current NMC rules)
Passport copy — valid 6+ months beyond program

documentChecklistSections.label: Visa & immigration (Russia — student visa)
items: Invitation letter for Russian student visa (if applicable)
Proof of tuition payment or financial guarantee
HIV test certificate (if required by consulate)
Visa application per Russian consulate guidance
Migration registration within 7 days of arrival in Russia

applicant.summary: During study in Russia, students must maintain valid student immigration status. Paid employment rules vary — verify local regulations before advising clients to work.
details: Unauthorized work may violate visa/residence conditions.
University may offer limited on-campus roles — verify with student services.
Maintain migration registration and valid residence permit in Russia.
restrictions: Never advise clients to work illegally to fund tuition

spouse.summary: Spouse/partner work rights depend on Russia dependant visa conditions — verify before promising employment.
details: Plan finances assuming limited spouse income unless visa explicitly permits work.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse employment without visa approval

fullCostBreakdown.title: Full cost breakdown — Synergy University
fullCostBreakdown.disclaimer: Indicative structure for counselor discussions. Tuition changes each academic year — always quote from https://synergy.ru/abiturientam/programmyi_obucheniya/medical_doctor before client commitment.

totals.label: Indicative total program budget
totals.value: Calculate from official tuition + full program living costs
totals.notes: Use synergy.ru tuition page; add 15% buffer for currency and fee increases.

eligibility.criterion: NEET qualified (Indian applicants — verify current NMC rule)
eligibility.note: Check NMC notification at admission year

redFlagsBanner: If client expects guaranteed licensure or residency without exams, reset expectations before taking fees.

redFlags.title: NMC list not verified
redFlags.description: Enrollment without checking current NMC foreign medical institutions list.

redFlags.title: Family relocation without visa plan
redFlags.fix: Immigration counsel before promising family join

redFlags.title: Wrong degree naming
redFlags.description: Misrepresenting MD vs MBBS equivalency for India.
